Title: Additional excavation — unforeseen rock
Description: Encountered granite bedrock at -6' elevation during excavation for north foundation. Blasting required per geotech recommendation. 3 additional days + rock removal cost.
Justification: Unforeseen subsurface conditions. No rock indicated in original geotech report.

Title: Owner-requested lobby upgrade — premium finishes
Description: Owner requests upgrade of Level 1 lobby finishes from allowance spec to premium imported marble, custom millwork, and designer lighting fixtures.
Justification: Owner-directed change per meeting notes 2/28/2026. Design by Davis+Partners.

Title: MEP redesign — relocated sprinkler main Level 3
Description: Sprinkler main relocated 8' east on Level 3 to clear structural beam added by addendum. Requires new hangers, additional pipe run, and pressure rebalance.
Justification: Structural beam added per CO-007 conflicts with original sprinkler main routing. Engineer directed reroute per SK-14.

Title: Structural beam added — N expansion grid
Description: Engineer of record issued SK-12 requiring additional W12x40 beam at north expansion grid to carry additional mechanical unit load added to roof scope.
Justification: EOR directed per structural calculation rev. Owner-approved roof unit addition triggered beam requirement.

Title: Asphalt paving — added parking area NE corner
Description: Owner requests 28 additional parking stalls in NE corner previously shown as future phase. Full depth asphalt, striping, wheel stops, lighting conduit.
Justification: Owner email 4/8/2026 requesting addition to maximize parking for CO.

Title: Credit — eliminate decorative column wraps
Description: Owner elects to eliminate decorative column wraps at lobby columns. Credit to contract for uninstalled material and labor.
Justification: Owner value engineering decision. Davis+Partners issued ASI-08 eliminating column wraps from scope.

Title: RFI-022 — beam pocket dimension correction
Description: Architect issued direction via RFI-022 response requiring beam pocket at Grid C to be 2" deeper than shown on S-401. Core drill required after pour. Labor and equipment costs.
Justification: Architectural direction per RFI-022 response dated 4/16/2026.

Title: Greenfield — added units B12–B16 scope
Description: Five additional residential units (B12–B16) added to scope. Full framing, MEP rough-in, drywall, and finishes package.
Justification: Owner added units per development financing milestone. Signed addendum 3/14/2026.
